name: Hammer Metals Limited
analysis: HMX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 5% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (3.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.0540. Trade idea: entry A$0.0570, stop A$0.0356, target A$0.1211 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
